texto: There are also other factors that make a person attractive to us, which have to do with what we sense we can experience with them, and how think they can enhance the quality of our life. We may feel that they have the capacity to bring more healing, passion, peace, exuberance, ease, fulfillment, or joy into our life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Linda Bloom sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “There are also other factors that make a person attractive to us, which have to do with what we s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, attraction, there, útil em momentos de reflexao.
